name: Playable Chess
description: A fully playable chess game with computer AI opponent, move validation, castling, en passant, pawn promotion, check detection, undo, and a dark wood-themed board. Human plays white, AI plays random legal moves.
author: mchatai-labs

wizardOrigin.notes: First chess mini-app to pass all quality checks with full inline engine (no stubs). Use as reference build for future chess requests.
